title: Visionary Architecture
scenario: Design a stunning architectural rendering for a new sustainable building. The rendering should incorporate elements that reflect the building's focus on eco-friendliness. It should be designed to be displayed at a large format (at least 4x6 feet).
constraints: Must be designed using 3D modeling software
Must be scalable to at least 4x6 feet

evaluationCriteria.description: The architectural rendering should demonstrate a high level of creativity and artistic merit.
The architectural rendering should remain visually appealing when scaled up to 4x6 feet.
The architectural rendering should be designed using 3D modeling software and meet the scalability constraint.
